Bash(git -C /mnt/c/Users/elija/SynologyDrive/Godot/five-parsecs-campaign-manager commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(safe-data-access\): Complete Sprint 26.19 - fix remaining Array/Dict/String misuse bugs

Sprint 26.19 completes the safe_get_property/safe_call_method consolidation
by fixing the final 12 bugs across 3 files.

CampaignPhaseManager.gd \(6 fixes\):
- Line 521: mission_dict.is_empty\(\) - Dictionary direct call
- Line 1184: crew_data.is_empty\(\) - Array direct call  
- Line 1185: crew_data.size\(\) - Array direct call
- Line 1186: crew_data.size\(\) > 0 - Array condition
- Line 1191: mission_data.is_empty\(\) and crew_data.is_empty\(\)
- Line 1354: _last_battle_results.is_empty\(\) - Dictionary direct call

BattleResultsManager.gd \(4 fixes + cleanup\):
- Added Godot4Utils preload for centralized utilities
- Line 201: Fixed type mismatch \(Character -> String\) + String empty check
- Line 328: Fixed type mismatch \(Character -> Array\)
- Line 331-332: Fixed String empty check with proper typing
- Removed local safe_get_property/safe_call_method definitions \(lines 558-575\)
- Fixed line ending encoding issues \(CRLF -> LF\)

WorldPhase.gd \(2 fixes + cleanup\):
- Added Godot4Utils preload for centralized utilities
- Lines 371-379: Simplified Array.size\(\) calls \(removed Variant workaround\)
- Removed local safe_get_property/safe_call_method definitions \(lines 1402-1419\)

Technical rationale:
safe_call_method\(\) only works on Object types. Arrays, Dictionaries, and
Strings are not Objects in Godot 4.x, so direct method calls are required.

Validated: Godot 4.5.1 parser check passes \(0 errors\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
